utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical: 'SecureLife Basic Plan - €45/month' and mental: 'SecureLife Basic Plan - €30/month' with costs—fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan gives 'HomeCo Basic Coverage - €10/month'—cost included, but it does not explicitly state home and contents breakdown; however, the format says 'home/contents insurance with costs' which can be satisfied by a single policy covering home/contents as long as costs are provided. This appears acceptable. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs: provided 'SecureLife Basic Travel Insurance - €20/month'—fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs: provided 'Specialized endorsement for photography and adventure activities - €80/month'—includes costs. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides '€185/month' only; no annual breakdown is provided. The requirement says complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, so this is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

Travel coverage is 'SecureLife Basic Travel Insurance - €20/month' which corresponds to 'SecureLife Basic Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 4.
